meta.siteTitle: La Bergerie & La Brassine - Charming cottages in Libin
meta.siteDescription: Two romantic cottages in Libin, in the Belgian Ardennes, designed for warm, elegant and authentic escapes for two.

footer.tagline: Two charming cottages set in a lovingly restored Ardennes building in Libin, created for romantic stays, thoughtful touches and easy direct booking.
footer.reserveText: WhatsApp is the easiest way to ask a question, check availability or arrange a romantic extra before arrival.
footer.copyright: La Bergerie & La Brassine - Libin, Belgium

hero.title: Two charming cottages made for slowing down and enjoying time together.
hero.description: In Libin, La Bergerie and La Brassine welcome couples into a warm, refined and deeply soothing atmosphere. One authentic building, two elegant cocoons, and a region made for switching off.
hero.imageAlt: View of the cottage property in Libin

stats.label: in the heart of the Belgian Ardennes

intro.title: A thoughtful welcome, almost like home
paragraphs: La Bergerie & La Brassine are two charming cottages tucked away in Libin, in the Ardennes. They were designed inside an authentic old building, with soft materials, quality comforts and details that instantly set the tone.
Beds are made before you arrive, towels are ready, the kitchen is truly equipped, and the welcome stays personal and genuine throughout the experience.
The website has been built to help guests picture the stay, book easily and find the practical information they usually ask for before arrival.

highlights.title: Made for couples
highlights.text: Each cottage welcomes 2 guests in a romantic, cocooning and reassuring atmosphere.

highlights.title: A region perfect for weekends
highlights.text: Walks, restaurants, charming villages and memorable discoveries around Libin, Redu, Mirwart and Saint-Hubert.

highlights.title: Simple direct booking
highlights.text: WhatsApp, email or Airbnb depending on what feels easiest for the traveller.

highlights.title: Romantic extras
highlights.text: Champagne, flowers, romantic decoration, gift vouchers or curated surprise boxes can all fit naturally into the stay.

gites.title: Two moods, the same sense of charm
gites.description: La Bergerie stands out for its space and light. La Brassine is smaller, cosier and more intimate. Both share the same attention to detail and warm hospitality.

bergerie.name: La Bergerie
bergerie.description: The larger of the two cottages, ideal for guests who love more room, a soft shabby chic mood and peaceful mornings in the rear garden.

brassine.name: La Brassine
brassine.description: Smaller, cosier and designed for privacy. A single-level retreat with a front garden and a deeply intimate atmosphere.

features.description: Both the stay and the website are meant to feel fluid, beautiful and reassuring from the first click to check-out.

meta.title: La Bergerie - Romantic cottage in Libin
meta.description: The larger of the two charming cottages in Libin. Romantic, bright, with a rear garden, equipped kitchen and refined shabby chic atmosphere.

hero.title: La Bergerie
hero.description: A more spacious, luminous and romantic escape in a soft shabby chic setting designed for two.

story.title: A gentle place filled with light
story.lead: La Bergerie is the larger of the two cottages. Guests love its comfortable proportions, natural light and feeling of space without losing the intimacy of a romantic stay.
paragraphs: Inside this old Ardennes building, the decor blends natural materials, soft tones and refined shabby chic details that give the stay a real sense of personality.
The living area invites you to slow down, the bedroom feels restful and the kitchen makes it easy to enjoy a dinner for two without compromise.
At the back, the garden extends the experience with a peaceful outdoor corner for coffee, aperitif or a quiet moment.

bergerie.galleryIntro: The gallery is already structured for your final photos later, with a mobile-friendly lightbox and clear file naming.
highlights: The most spacious of the two cottages
Beds ready on arrival and quality linen
Ideal for a peaceful romantic weekend

stayInfo.title: Arrival & welcome
stayInfo.text: Check-in is between 4:00 pm and 11:00 pm, with in-person key handover and a warm personal welcome.

stayInfo.title: Daily comfort
stayInfo.text: Towels provided, beds prepared, Wi-Fi, television, full kitchen and an available host if needed.

stayInfo.title: Parking
stayInfo.text: Free parking on site, with electric charging available on request.

reviewHighlight.author: Highlighted review
reviewHighlight.text: A stay that combines charm, comfort and a genuine feeling of being well looked after. La Bergerie often appeals to couples who want more space and a peaceful mood.

outdoor.title: The rear garden
outdoor.text: One of its loveliest advantages. It extends the cottage outdoors with a quiet, green and restful atmosphere.

bergerie.faqIntro: A cottage-specific FAQ to help guests picture the stay and reduce repetitive questions before booking or arrival.

faq.question: Is La Bergerie larger than La Brassine?
faq.answer: Yes. It is the more spacious cottage, which many couples appreciate when they want a little more room to enjoy the stay.

faq.question: Is the garden easy to access?
faq.answer: Yes, La Bergerie opens onto the rear garden, which is one of its strongest assets.

faq.question: Can we cook properly on site?
faq.answer: Yes. The kitchen is well equipped with oven, stove, dishwasher, coffee machine and the essentials for cooking together.

faq.question: Is it suitable for a special occasion?
faq.answer: Absolutely. It works beautifully for a romantic surprise, anniversary or a carefully prepared couple's weekend.

meta.title: La Brassine - Cosy romantic cottage in Libin
meta.description: A smaller, more intimate and cocooning cottage in Libin, all on one level, with a front garden and a warm atmosphere made for privacy.

hero.title: La Brassine
hero.description: A deeply cosy retreat, more intimate and more enveloping, ideal for couples looking for softness and privacy.

story.title: A little nest designed for intimacy
story.lead: La Brassine is smaller than La Bergerie, and that is exactly part of its charm. It feels like a warm retreat, easy to live in and especially pleasant for two.
paragraphs: The cottage is entirely on one level, which makes the stay simple and comfortable. The atmosphere is romantic, soft and cocooning from the very first steps inside.
Each space has been designed to create immediate well-being: a cosy bedroom, a welcoming living space and everything needed to cook, unwind and enjoy being together.
The front garden reinforces that feeling of privacy and gives the stay a lovely outdoor extension.

brassine.galleryIntro: The gallery is already prepared for your final visuals and offers a smooth viewing experience on both mobile and desktop.
highlights: The most cocooning of the two cottages

stayInfo.title: Arrival & welcome
stayInfo.text: Check-in is between 4:00 pm and 11:00 pm, with in-person key handover and a caring welcome.

stayInfo.title: Cosy comfort
stayInfo.text: Beds made, towels ready, blackout blinds, Wi-Fi and all the essentials for a stay you can fully enjoy indoors as well.

stayInfo.title: Accessibility & outdoors
stayInfo.text: The cottage is entirely single-level and enjoys a pleasant front garden.

reviewHighlight.author: Highlighted review
reviewHighlight.text: La Brassine is often chosen for its deeply intimate atmosphere. Guests love the cocooning feeling and the sense of a true couple's hideaway.

outdoor.title: The front garden
outdoor.text: This outdoor corner reinforces privacy and offers a lovely setting for coffee, aperitif or breakfast outside.

brassine.faqIntro: A dedicated FAQ to help guests immediately understand the mood and experience of La Brassine.

faq.question: Is La Brassine smaller than La Bergerie?
faq.answer: Yes, it is more compact, which is exactly what makes it feel especially cosy and intimate.

faq.question: Is the cottage all on one level?
faq.answer: Yes, entirely. That is one of its comfort advantages.

faq.question: Does it feel different from La Bergerie?
faq.answer: Yes. La Brassine is more enveloping and intimate, with a true cocooning atmosphere for couples.

faq.question: Can we still enjoy the whole stay on site?
faq.answer: Absolutely. The kitchen is equipped, the TV allows streaming and everything supports a comfortable slow stay indoors.

meta.title: Practical guide - Prepare your stay in Libin
meta.description: Everything guests need before arrival: check-in, check-out, parking, linen, Wi-Fi, television, heating, waste sorting and departure.

hero.title: Useful, simple and reassuring information
hero.description: This page is designed to answer recurring questions quickly and make the experience smoother before, during and after the stay.

sections.title: Arrival, welcome and settling in
sections.text: Check-in takes place between 4:00 pm and 11:00 pm. Keys are handed over in person in a simple and welcoming way. If you have an approximate arrival time, it is helpful to share it in advance.

points.title: Linen provided
points.text: Towels are ready and beds are made before arrival.

points.title: Host next door
points.text: The host's house is attached, which allows quick help if needed while still respecting your privacy.

sections.title: Comfort, kitchen, Wi-Fi and television
sections.text: Everything is there so guests can enjoy the cottage without improvising. The kitchen is properly equipped, Wi-Fi is available throughout and the TV supports streaming.

points.title: Kitchen
points.text: Oven, stove, microwave, dishwasher, fridge, freezer, coffee machine, kettle, toaster, dishes, wine glasses and cooking essentials.

points.title: TV & streaming
points.text: Turn on the TV, select the input or app you want, then sign in to your own streaming service if needed. Please remember to sign out before leaving.

points.title: Wi-Fi
points.text: Wi-Fi covers the whole property. Ethernet is also available.

points.title: EV charging
points.text: Charging can be arranged on request. It is best to mention it before arrival.

sections.title: Heating, waste and a few useful reminders
sections.text: Heating works with a heat pump. To keep the cottage comfortable and avoid disrupting the system, it is best not to change settings significantly unless really necessary.

points.title: Heat pump
points.text: The system is already set for comfortable temperatures. If something feels unusual, it is better to contact the host rather than changing multiple settings.

points.title: Waste sorting
points.text: Guests are asked to sort waste. Bags can be left in front of the door after letting the host know, and the host takes care of the rest.

points.title: Small reminder
points.text: Please respect the calm atmosphere, the equipment provided and the warm spirit of the house.

sections.title: What to do before check-out
sections.text: The idea is not to turn the end of the stay into a chore. A few simple gestures are enough.
bullets: Check that nothing is left behind in the cottage
Leave the kitchen in a reasonably clean condition
Sort the waste and leave it ready if needed
Close windows and switch off anything unnecessary
Respect the check-out time before 10:00 am

guide.faqDescription: A reassuring FAQ designed to reduce repetitive messages without sounding rigid.

faq.question: Can we arrive late?
faq.answer: Check-in is planned between 4:00 pm and 11:00 pm. If you expect to arrive towards the end of that window, it is best to let the host know.

faq.question: Is parking easy?
faq.answer: Yes. There are 7 parking spaces in total, so arrival is straightforward.

faq.question: Do we need to bring sheets or towels?
faq.answer: No. Everything is provided and beds are ready before arrival.

faq.question: Can we adjust the heating ourselves?
faq.answer: The heat pump is already set for comfort. If anything feels unusual, it is best to contact the host before changing the settings.

faq.question: How should we handle waste?
faq.answer: Guests are asked to sort waste. Bags can be left in front of the door after informing the host, who then handles the rest.

faq.question: Is someone easy to reach if there is a problem?
faq.answer: Yes. The host remains available, and the attached house allows quick support if needed.

hero.title: Ask about a stay, send a request or book directly
hero.description: WhatsApp is highlighted for direct booking and quick exchanges. The contact form is already structured and ready to be connected later.

direct.title: The easiest place to start
direct.text: For availability, questions or romantic extras, WhatsApp is the fastest route. Airbnb links stay visible for guests who prefer booking there.

practicalCards.title: Address
practicalCards.text: Rue du Cure 19, 6890 Libin, Belgium. Shown here rather than everywhere else on the site.

practicalCards.title: Check-in / check-out
practicalCards.text: Arrival between 4:00 pm and 11:00 pm, departure before 10:00 am.

practicalCards.title: Bookings
practicalCards.text: Either directly via WhatsApp or through Airbnb depending on the guest's preference.

form.title: Send an enquiry
